changes.heading: Feint Attack+ \[NERFED\]
lines: BUGFIX: Fixed an issue where Meowth's Feint Attack+ triggered twice upon dealing damage.

changes.heading: Fury Swipes \[NERFED\]
lines: Effect: 15% Max CDR per hit → 7.5% Max CDR per hit

changes.heading: Fury Cutter \[BUFFED\]
lines: NEW Mechanic: If interrupted, grants 50% Remaining CDR.

changes.heading: Water Shuriken \[BUFFED\]
lines: Number of Shuriken: Normalized: 4 Shurikens thrown.

changes.heading: Water Shuriken+ \[BUFFED\]
lines: Number of Shuriken: Normalized: 5 Shurikens thrown.

changes.heading: Water Shuriken:
lines: General: Bug fix: Slow on-hit bugfixed.

changes.heading: Water Shiriken
lines: General: Fixed a bug in which the effect of lowering an opponent's Pokémon's movement speed was not triggered under certain conditions.

changes.heading: Smoke Screen
lines: Fixed a bug where the Smoke+ effect would occur even before upgrading.

changes.heading: Smokescreen:
lines: General: The blind duration is reportedly lessened, but we don't have data on that unfortunately.

changes.heading: Double Team:
lines: General: Clones now deal less damage.

changes.heading: Double Team
lines: General: EFFECT → Adjusted to make it easier for opposing Pokémon to attack clones.
General: EFFECT → Clones can now also activate abilities which do 25% damage.

changes.heading: Heatwave \[NERFED\]
lines: Health recovery: Sp. Atk scaling replaced with 5% Max HP.

changes.heading: Heatwave+ \[NERFED\]
lines: Cooldown Reduction: 2s per hit → 1s per hit

changes.heading: Bullet Seed \[BUGFIXED\]
lines: General: If affected by an interruption hindrance, Bullet Seed will restart automatically if the control to activate it is continued to be held down.

changes.heading: Bullet Seed \[BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Bullet Seed properly stops when being Bound by Slowbro's Slowbeam.

changes.heading: Bullet Seed
lines: Fixed a bug that caused Bullet Seed to not function while slowed.

changes.heading: Belch \[BUFFED\]
lines: Movement Speed Decrease: 15% for 1s → 40% for 2s, decreasing by 10% every 0.5s

lines: Damage: 75% Sp. Attack replaced with 55% Attack.

changes.heading: Covet +
lines: Damage: 79% Sp. Attack replaced with 59% Attack.

changes.heading: Defense Curl:
lines: Shield amount: 15% Max Health → 10% Max Health

changes.heading: Covet:
lines: General: Fixed a bug that allowed Belch to be spammed *much* more quickly than intended under certain conditions.

changes.heading: Defense Curl:
lines: Shield amount: 15% Max Health → 10% Max Health

changes.heading: Zap Cannon \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where Zapdos's empowered Zap Cannon was dealing unintended damage.

changes.heading: Thunderbolt+ \[BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Fixed an issue where the cooldown reduction for Zapdos's Thunderbolt+ failed to trigger upon knocking out an opposing Pokémon.

changes.heading: Agility \[BUFFED\]
lines: Effect: 5-80% Movement Speed Increase → 20-80% Movement Speed Increase

lines: Fixed a bug where Dragon Claw+ would be used instead of Dragon Claw when used in combination with Dragon Rush+.

lines: General: New: Now briefly stuns on placement.

changes.heading: Barrier:

changes.heading: Fake Out
lines: General: REMOVED: No longer stuns after the shove.

changes.heading: Psychic
lines: REWORK: Pulses energy dealing damage in an area around themself, any target affected by Guard Swap, and any Barriers or Light Screens. After three pulses, a final pulse will stun those damaged by 1s.
REWORK: Damage - Final Pulse NEW: 101% SpA + 11 x (Level - 1) + 240.
REWORK: Damage - Pulse NEW: 30.3% SpA x 3 x (Level - 1) + 72.
REWORK: SpDef Shred NEW: 5% each damage tick for 3s.

changes.heading: Psychic:
lines: General: Mime can now attack during the cast.

changes.heading: Power Swap+
lines: General: Now properly works with confusion.

changes.heading: Light Screen
lines: General: New: Now briefly stuns on placement.

changes.heading: Fake Out
lines: General: REMOVED: No longer stuns after the shove.

lines: General: Additional Damage equal to 10%/5% missing HP from Center/Conal area damage capped at 1200/600 respectively.

lines: Fixed a bug where Wicked Blow could be pre-charged and re-launched within a time that would result in an instant full charged Wicked Blow.

changes.heading: Sacred Fire \[ADDED\]
lines: Effect: Added: Shoot a mystical fire at an area, dealing damage to non-allied Pokémon it hits, stunning them for 0.6s, and leaving them burned for 3s, reducing their Attack by 15%. Then fly up high into the air.

lines: Effect: Added: Increases the Attack reduction of the burn to 30%.

changes.heading: Sing:
lines: General: Sleeping mons are meant to wake up when damaged, which has now been implemented. This changes pretty much nothing for *this* sleep effect, since the duration is about as long as the minimum damage-awakening time.

lines: General: Slow effect caused by being in the radius before sleep has increased slightly.

changes.heading: Horn Leech \[BUFFED/BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where Horn Leech could not throw Pokémon at the end of its dash.

changes.heading: Phantom Force \[BUFFED\]
lines: General: No longer requires enemy or allied player targetting. Instead Hoopa may target the ground as a standard Area of Effect move.

changes.heading: Trick+
lines: Health recovery: * 40% damage dealt → 25% damage dealt

changes.heading: Hyperspace Hole \[BUG FIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where Hoopa and its allies were invulnerable and uninterruptable just before the warp.

changes.heading: Hyperspace Hole \[NERFED\]
lines: Cooldown: Movement speed reduced from 110% to 70%.

Dark Pulse.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

Ancient Power.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Stone Edge \[BUFFED\]
lines: General: Reduced the delay between using the first and second casts.

changes.heading: Floral Healing \[BUFFED\]
lines: Overheal shield (base): Now we know its intended to stack the base shield while you have nothing else to do until the next engagement.

changes.heading: Sweet Kiss \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where the visual effects for Comfey's Sweet Kiss were not displaying.

changes.heading: Sweet Kiss \[BUFFED\]
lines: Shield amount: 0% Sp. Attack → 60% Sp. Attack

changes.heading: Power-up Punch
lines: Fixed a bug that caused the dash to be shorter than intended when fully charged.

changes.heading: Power-Up Punch:
lines: General: No longer ends the dash behind target hit.

changes.heading: Power-Up-Punch
lines: General: Edit: This appears to have been an obscure bug fix and no balance update.

changes.heading: Power-Up-Punch
lines: General: Bug fix: When spamming attack after using PuP, sometimes the damage from PuP was negated. This has been fixed.

changes.heading: Close Combat:
lines: General: No longer heals per enemy hit. Instead only heals one time per punch.

changes.heading: Bone Rush \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed bug(s) that affected the following: Cooldown.

changes.heading: Extreme Speed+
lines: General: Damage buff changed to Attack stat buff.

changes.heading: Triple Axel \[BUFFED\]
lines: Heal per hit per target (Queenly Majesty Buff): 21% Increase

changes.heading: Stomp \[BUFFED\]
lines: Heal per hit per target (Queenly Majesty Buff): 21% Increase

changes.heading: Grassy Glide:
lines: General: Bug fix: Can now be cancelled early into itself, again.

changes.heading: Whirlpool \[NERFED\]
lines: Against Players: 60% of Damage dealt → 40% of Damage dealt
Against Wilds: 30% of Damage dealt → 20% of Damage dealt
Against Players: 80% of Damage dealt → 50% of Damage dealt
Against Wilds: 40% of Damage dealt → 25% of Damage dealt

changes.heading: Charge Beam
lines: Fixed a bug where Charge Beam was still being fired while Shedinja Doll was active.

changes.heading: Electro Drift \[NERFED\]
lines: Damage (Boosted when target is <50% HP): 13% Decrease

changes.heading: Electro Drift
lines: Fixed a bug where Electro Drift completed and repositioned even if Shedinja Doll is activated.

changes.heading: Electro Drift \[BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Electro Drift no longer launches in the opposite direction when acquiring a knock out with its boosted version.

changes.heading: Dragon Dance \[BUFFED\]
lines: Attack boost: 8% per stack → 10% per stack

changes.heading: Hyper Beam \[BUFFED\]
lines: 1 Dragon Dance: 5% target Max HP → 6% target Max HP
2 Dragon Dances: 10% target Max HP → 12% target Max HP
3 Dragon Dances: 15% target Max HP → 18% target Max HP

changes.heading: Hyper Beam \[NERFED\]
lines: Additional Damage: 20% of opponent Max HP → 15% of opponent Max HP

changes.heading: Flame charge
lines: General: Increased movement speed duration; Increased range of detection for summoning fireballs.

changes.heading: Scald
lines: General: Burn (BUGFIX): Now burning all ticks instead of just 2.

changes.heading: Slack Off \[BUFFED\]
lines: Health recovery: 1.5% Max HP every 0.5s for 3s → 2% Max HP every 0.5s for 3s

changes.heading: Amnesia
lines: General: No longer adds a 10% damage increase to the next Surf or Scald.

changes.heading: Amnesia +
lines: General: No longer increases SpA, now increases SpD by 150.

changes.heading: Surf+:
lines: General: The game runs at 60fps, so these can be read as "sixtieths of a second" duration.

changes.heading: Telekinesis \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where some moves would not hit non-allied Pokémon suspended in the air by Telekinesis.

changes.heading: Slack Off \[BUFFED\]
lines: Health recovery: 1.5% Max HP every 0.5s for 3s → 2% Max HP every 0.5s for 3s

changes.heading: Leaf Tornado:
lines: General: EFFECT → Improved the attack animation to better match the feel of the game.

changes.heading: Cotton Spore+ \[BUFFED\]
lines: Defense and Special Defense Increase: +40% defenses → +50% defenses

changes.heading: Cotton Spore:
lines: General: Def, SpD boosted, ratios unknown.

changes.heading: Cotton Guard:
lines: General: Fixed an issue with HP recovery at the end of the move.

changes.heading: Flail \[BUFFED\]
lines: increased: 70% for 2s decreasing every 0.5s by 10% down to 30% → 80% for 2s decreasing every 0.5s by 10% down to 40%

changes.heading: Yawn:
lines: General: Sleeping mons are meant to wake up when damaged, which has now been implemented.

changes.heading: Block+ \[BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Fixed an issue where Snorlax's Block+ knocked back down fewer times than intended.

changes.heading: Block \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where the effects of Block+ were available to Block. Specifically, Block+'s ability to shove/stun Pokémon and its internal cooldown was available on Block.

changes.heading: Block:
lines: General: Bug fix: Block no longer has Block+'s damage reduction, and Block+'s damage reduction now actually works properly.

changes.heading: Shadow Sneak \[NERFED\]
lines: Additional Damage: 6% Enemy Missing HP → 4% Enemy Missing HP

changes.heading: Shadow Sneak \[BUFFED\]
lines: Damage (Additional to Marked Targets): 4% → 6% of opponent's missing HP

Trick Room.title: Patch 1.21.1.7 The Roar of Sea and Sky Part 2

changes.heading: Shadow Claw+ \[BUFFED\]
lines: Additional Damage: 10% → 12% of opponent's missing HP

changes.heading: Ice Hammer \[BUFFED\]
lines: Effect: 50% Slow → 70% Slow Decaying by 10% every 0.5s

changes.heading: Ice Hammer \[BUFFED\]
lines: Time you cannot move after using Ice Hammer: Reduced.

changes.heading: Flame Charge+ \[BUGFIXED\]
lines: General: Flame Charge+ now goes through walls again.

changes.heading: Fly:
lines: General: (Description change) The next attack after using fly becomes a boosted attack.

changes.heading: Fly:
lines: General: EFFECT → Increased movespeed while flying

changes.heading: Whirlpool \[BUG FIXED\]
lines: General: Fixed an issue where the move continued even after being KO'd.

changes.heading: Whirlpool \[BUG FIXED\]
lines: General: Fixed an issue where the move continued even after being KO'd.

changes.heading: Dragon Dance \[BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Fixed: Dragon Dance’s cooldown will now properly reset upon getting a KO outside of the duration of the move.

changes.heading: Shadow Ball \[BUFFED\]
lines: Health recovery: 15% user Max HP → 20% user Max HP

changes.heading: Stored Power \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where Stored Power and empowered Stored Power could be used simultaneously.

changes.heading: Stored Power+ \[BUFFED\]
lines: Additional Damage Trigger: Opponent's HP below 40% → 50%

changes.heading: Stored Power \[NERFED\]
lines: Damage (Subsequent Hits): 19.2% Sp. Attack replaced with 19.6%.

changes.heading: Stored Power
lines: General: + Reduced the charge time for blasts to recharge.

changes.heading: Razor Leaf \[BUFFED\]
lines: Damage (Automatic return first Leaf or Manual return first Leaf if after 1s):: 10% Increase

changes.heading: Aerial Ace \[NERFED/BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where Leafeon's basic attack could be used without animation delay after hitting with a boosted attack after using Aerial Ace.

Icicle Spear.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Icicle Spear+ \[NERFED\]
lines: Additional **Current HP damage** reduced: 2% HP → 1% HP

changes.heading: Icicle Spear \[BUG FIXED\]
lines: Fixed a bug where wild Pokémon hit by icicles were taking extra damage due to the icicles dealing their base damage as well as shrapnel damage, effectively doubling or quadrupling at Icicle Spear+ Glaceon's damage to wild Pokémon.

changes.heading: Icicle Spear
lines: Fixed a bug where the shattered Icicle Spear damage would linger after hitting its target.
General: New: Maximum of 12 spears per cast.

Ice Shard.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Ice Shard \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where the attack range indicator would appear around Glaceon when using Ice Shard.

Icy Wind.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Icy Wind \[BUG-NOT-FIX\]
lines: General: Attack range indicator appears around Glaceon when using Icy Wind.

changes.heading: Icy Wind:
lines: General: Bug fix: Some effect was not triggered and is now fixed?

Follow Me.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Follow Me \[BUG FIXED\]
lines: Fixed a bug where Pokémon affected by Follow Me would have their attacks and moves deal damage to their allies.

changes.heading: Gravity \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where Galarian Rapidash's Fairy Wind could be activated inside Clefable's Gravity.

changes.heading: Gravity
lines: Fixed a bug where some or all of the effects of moves were not usable.
Fixed a bug where some Pokémon's moves could not be used due to the effects of Gravity.
General: Fixed an issue where some Pokémon's boosted attacks could not be used due to the effects of Gravity.

Electro Ball.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Volt Tackle \[BUFFED\]
lines: changed: 30% for 2s → 60% decaying by 10% every 0.5s (minimum 30%) (total movement speed increase time unchanged at 2s).

changes.heading: Thunder:
lines: General: Fixed a bug where using several moves in quick succession would cause Thunder to not trigger, but go on cooldown.

Teleport.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

Recover.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Recover \[BUFFED\]
lines: Health recovery: 20% of damage dealt → 30% of damage dealt

changes.heading: Recover+ \[BUFFED\]
lines: Health recovery: 30% of damage dealt → 40% of damage dealt

changes.heading: Future Sight \[BUGFIX?\]
lines: General: After 3s, Mewtwo deals damage to the locked-on enemy a second time, and additional damage equal to 50% of any damage they received ~~from Mewtwo~~ while locked-on.

changes.heading: Future Sight \[NERFED\]
lines: Locked (on enemy damage increase): Reduced from 20% to 10%.

changes.heading: Future Sight+ \[NERFED\]
lines: Locked (on enemy damage increase): Reduced from 30% to 15%.

changes.heading: Flame Charge \[NERFED\]
lines: Shield amount: 240% Sp. Attack replaced with 120%.

changes.heading: Fire Spin \[REWORKED\]
lines: Defense and Special Defense bonus: Removed.
When hitting Pokémon with move damage, gain a shield stacking up to 6 times: Added.
When using Fire Spin, increase movement speed by 20% for the move's duration: Added.
When moving towards an enemy Pokémon, increase movement speed by 10%: Added.
Shield (up to 6): 0% Sp. Attack → 24% Sp. Attack

changes.heading: Fire Spin+ \[REWORKED\]
lines: When using a move, increase movement speed by 30%: Removed.
Gain 3 stacks of shield when activating Fire Spin+: Added.

changes.heading: Imprison \[BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Fixed bug(s) causing extra effects to occur.
General: Bugs fixed for the following effects on opposing Pokémon:.

changes.heading: Poltergeist \[BUFFED\]
lines: Slow: From contacting the border or furniture changed from 65% slow for 1s to 65% slow for 1s decaying to a 40% slow over 1 second, then the 40% slow lingers for an additional second.

changes.heading: Poltergeist+ \[BUFFED\]
lines: Slow: From contacting the border or furniture changed from 80% slow for 1s to 80% slow for 1s decaying to a 50% slow over 1 second, then the 50% slow lingers for an additional second.

changes.heading: Shadow Sneak \[NERFED\]
lines: General: Using Shadow Sneak while stealthed now reveals you. This change comes as a work around bugfix for the issues Shadow Sneak was presenting.

changes.heading: Shadow Sneak \[NERFED & BUFFED?\]
lines: Duration until stealth when activated: Now displays with a count down bar.
Duration until stealth when activated: Site description will be updated to more accurately reflect mechanics of Shadow Sneak.

changes.heading: Knock Off \[NERFED\]
lines: Incapacitation duration: For no Aeos energy decreased: 1.2s - 1s.

Teleport.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Future Sight \[BUGFIX?\]
lines: General: After 3s, Mewtwo deals damage to the locked-on enemy a second time, and additional damage equal to 50% of any damage they received ~~from Mewtwo~~ while locked-on.

changes.heading: Iron Head
lines: General: Increased the cooldown reduction from blocking damage. 2.2s → 3s

changes.heading: Sacred Sword
lines: General: Edit: Thanks to UniteAPI and work from Abunzu in the Mathcord, we have the numbers.

changes.heading: Ice Beam \[BUFFED\]
lines: BUGFIX: Fixed an issue where cooldown reduction effects were not applying to Suicune's Ice Beam, and Suicune's Icy Wind.

Dragon Breath.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Dragon Breath \[BUFFED\]
lines: changed: "Attack speed boost is increased by 20% based on how many additional enemies become paralyzed (up to 2 additional enemies hit)." → "Attack speed boost is increased by 20% based on how many additional enemies get hit (up to 2 additional enemies hit)."

Waterfall.title: 1.21.1.2 The Roar of Sea and Sky

changes.heading: Aqua Tail \[BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Fixed an issue where Gyarados would sometimes be unable to use Aqua Tail after using the second stage of Waterfall.

changes.heading: Bounce \[NERFED\]
lines: General: Now Throws Pokémon when max charged instead of throwing Pokémon paralyzed by Dragon Breath first. (Engage is more telegraphed and cannot follow up cc after a Dragon Breath in this manner).

changes.heading: Meteor Mash
lines: Fixed a bug involving the punch area of effect.

changes.heading: Meteor Mash \[BUFFED\]
lines: Punch Healing (1 (2 Charges)): 6% Max HP → 9% Max HP
Punch Healing (3 (4 Charges)): 8% Max HP → 10% Max HP
Punch Healing (5 (6 Charges)): 10% Max HP → 11% Max HP

changes.heading: Leech Life \[BUGFIXED\]
lines: General: Fixed an bug that caused the caught and held effect to last shorter than expected.

changes.heading: Superpower \[BUFFED\]
lines: Shield amount: 12% Max HP + 2% HP * Muscle Gauge → 20% Max HP + 2% HP * Muscle Gauge

changes.heading: Superpower \[BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Grabbing targets launched by Smack Down with Superpower and dealing both instances of damage on landing no longer generates muscle gauge.

changes.heading: Superpower+ \[NERFED\]
lines: Cooldown is reset when Muscle Gauge is filled: Replaced by Cooldown is reduced by 3s when Muscle Gauge is filled.

changes.heading: Superpower
lines: General: Now treats Hindrance Resistant targets as Unstoppable.

changes.heading: Muddy Water \[BUFFED\]
lines: Defense & Sp. Defense per Stack: 20% Increase

changes.heading: Muddy Water+ \[BUFFED\]
lines: Defense & Sp. Defense per Stack: 22% Increase

changes.heading: Power Whip \[BUFFED\]
lines: Movement speed reduction: adjusted from 50% for 2s → 80% diminishing 15% every 0.5s for 3s

changes.heading: Power Whip
lines: General: Fixed an issue that Power Whip would sometimes pull Pokémon that were not hit by it.

changes.heading: Acid Spray \[BUFFED\]
lines: Movement speed reduction: adjusted from 40% for 2s → 80% diminishing 15% every 0.5s for 3s

changes.heading: Acid Spray
lines: Fixed a bug where Acid Spray was not splashing from the projectile.

changes.heading: Bubble
lines: General: Bug fix: Related to movement speed reduction to enemies.

changes.heading: Whirlpool
lines: General: Bug fix: Related to dealing damage to enemies.

changes.heading: Bubble
lines: General: Bug fix: Related to movement speed reduction to enemies.

changes.heading: Aqua Tail
lines: General: Laz note: These two changes together means Aqua Tail deals more damage when the target is below about 150 Def, and less when they're above. This is a rough estimate, and the exact amount will change depending on items.

changes.heading: Play Rough
lines: General: EDIT: This was our mistake, Play Rough did not receive a buff.

changes.heading: Wild Charge \[BUGFIX\]
lines: General: Wild Charge hitbox no longer lingers past its animation.

changes.heading: Wild Charge
lines: General: Fixed an issue where the increase in the number of Spark attacks was canceled by Full Heal.

changes.heading: Wild Charge:
lines: Fixed a bug that caused the move to deal high damage when hitting many Pokemon (upgraded version).

changes.heading: Wild Charge:
lines: General: Wild Charge's cooldown is reduced at level 10.

General: Wild Charge is a particularly difficult ability to measure. It seems to scale off many independent factors that makes it nearly impossible to adequately measure. Details will come once we crack it. This move's damage was buffed.

changes.heading: Spark \[BUFFED\]
lines: General: Increased responsiveness of the attack after Spark used.

changes.heading: Spark:
lines: General: The time between attacks has been lengthened to make it easier to use attacks in succession.
General: EFFECT → The number of Wild Bolts in a row will now increase when you perform a normal attack while using Spark.

changes.heading: Mystical Fire \[BUFFED\]
lines: damage increased: 25% of first flame → 28% of first flame

changes.heading: Mystical Fire
lines: General: Fixed a bug affecting this move's use against Wild Mons.

changes.heading: Hyper Voice+ \[REWORKED\]
lines: General: New: Effect: Pokémon hit by Hyper Voice+ are slowed by 30%.

changes.heading: Sludge Bomb \[BUFFED\]
lines: Damage: 37% Sp. Attack replaced with % 45% Sp. Attack.

changes.heading: Sludge Bomb \[BUFFED\]
lines: Slow: Added: 35% for 1s on the initial hit. Stacks with the AoE slow.

changes.heading: Solar Beam \[BUFFED\]
lines: increased: 1.5% Enemy Max HP → 2.5% Enemy Max HP

changes.heading: Solar Beam:
lines: Max HP Tick: 1% Enemy Max HP → 1.5%

changes.heading: Solar Beam:
lines: General: Solar Beam now has a cooldown that scales. Every two levels, it reduces a half of a second, until it's upgraded.

changes.heading: Petal Dance \[NERFED\]
lines: Movement Speed Increase: 90-27% movement speed increase → 80-17% movement speed increase

changes.heading: Petal Dance
lines: General: Movespeed from Dance now decays over time.

changes.heading: Blizzard
lines: General: Radius of AoE after hitting an obstacle increased.
General: Duration of shove (and thus distance of shove) increased.
General: Duration of AoE after hitting an obstacle increased from 3s to 4s (adding two additional ticks of damage).

changes.heading: Blizzard:
lines: Damage: This ability was reworked. It now makes an icy wind, and hits twice (second hit double first hit damage). If it hits wall, the creates a DoT area for 6 ticks (damage per tick same as first hit).

changes.heading: Aurora Veil
lines: General: Laz note: Attack speed is another one of those things thats very difficult to pinpoint, we'll get it updated ASAP.

changes.heading: Aurora Veil:
lines: Damage: Now is also a dash and causes boosted attacks to heal while in Veil.

changes.heading: Pursuit \[NERFED\]
lines: Backstab Cooldown Reduction: 80% Remaining Cooldown → 70% Remaining Cooldown

changes.heading: Night Slash
lines: Critical chance per 1% missing HP: * Maximum additional 30% crit chance occurs at 38% missing HP.

changes.heading: Night Slash:
lines: General: Bug fix: Hitbox range on second slash.

changes.heading: Night Slash+:
lines: General: Bug fix: Healing was not triggering.

changes.heading: Night Slash:
lines: General: EFFECT → The second attack's hitbox has shrunk.

changes.heading: Psycho Cut
lines: General: Now procs off Nightslash hits and Unite.

changes.heading: Sucker Punch \[BUGFIX\]
lines: Fixed a bug where Sucker Punch would not negate damage as part of its effects.

changes.heading: Sucker Punch:
lines: General: EFFECT → Activates much faster than before.
General: EFFECT → Increased the duration of hindrance immunity while using this move.

changes.heading: Night Slash \[NERFED\]
lines: Healing (Final Slash): ~~Zoroark recovers HP if hitting enemies with this slashing attack.~~ →

Healing (Final Slash): Zoroark additionally recovers HP if enemies are hit with either of the two rectangular diagonally oriented areas of the cross slash up to once per area. Hitting a target in the overlap of the two rectangular diagonally oriented areas will heal double the value.
Healing (Final Slash (per area)): 160.4% Attack replaced with ~~120%~~ Attack -> 60% Attack.

changes.heading: Night Slash \[NERFED\]
lines: Fixed a bug where Night Slash was dealing double damage.

changes.heading: Night Slash+ \[NERFED\]
lines: Fixed a bug where Night Slash+ could not be upgraded under certain situations.

changes.heading: Dual Wingbeat \[NERFED\]
lines: Damage (Additional): 20% Enemy Missing HP → 15% Enemy Missing HP
